name: Color Force II 48 Plus

importPlugin.comment: GDTF v1.2 fixture type ID: EA20C447-4A7B-11EF-9FDD-525400685065

comment:
Color Force II 48 Plus boasts enhanced brightness and a richer palette while maintaining the same form factor and character as the market-leading original. The innovative optical system with individually controlled pixels provides smooth, beautiful, and even coverage for any cyc or surface with no unsightly colour shadowing.

Designed for a variety of applications where powerful and precise lighting is essential, including cyc, flood, and wall washing up to 12m.

modes.name: RGBA Od Ev Strobe On Top
